zh.name: 趙浩然
zh.title: 特聘教授兼系主任
zh.lab: 環境與健康風險評估實驗室（EP108）
zh.tagline: 從環境暴露到健康風險，建立跨域科學證據
zh.bio: 趙浩然教授的研究橫跨空氣污染物、奈米材料毒性、環境暴露與健康風險評估、持久性有機污染物、微生物指標與環境監測。近年聚焦 PM2.5 毒性、阻燃劑暴露、兒童與新生兒健康指標，以及氣候變遷與溫室氣體減量，研究成果可為環境毒理、公共衛生及永續環境管理提供科學證據。
education: 國立成功大學環境工程博士
國立成功大學環境工程碩士
國立成功大學生物學系學士
experience: 國立屏東科技大學環境工程與科學系特聘教授兼系主任
國立屏東科技大學環境工程與科學系教授
中華醫事科技大學環境與安全衛生工程系助理教授
國家衛生研究院環境衛生與職業醫學研究組博士後研究員
zh.office: 環境與健康風險評估實驗室（EP108）

en.name: How-Ran Chao
en.title: Distinguished Professor and Department Chair
en.department: Department of Environmental Science and Engineering
en.university: National Pingtung University of Science and Technology
en.lab: Environmental and Health Risk Assessment Laboratory (EP108)
en.tagline: Connecting environmental exposure with human health risk
en.bio: Prof. How-Ran Chao conducts interdisciplinary research on air pollutants, nanomaterial toxicity, environmental exposure and health risk assessment, persistent organic pollutants, microbial indicators, and environmental monitoring. His recent work addresses PM2.5 toxicity, flame-retardant exposure, child and neonatal health indicators, climate change, and greenhouse-gas reduction.
education: Ph.D. in Environmental Engineering, National Cheng Kung University
M.S. in Environmental Engineering, National Cheng Kung University
B.S. in Biology, National Cheng Kung University
experience: Distinguished Professor and Department Chair, Department of Environmental Science and Engineering, NPUST
Professor, Department of Environmental Science and Engineering, NPUST
Assistant Professor, Department of Environmental and Occupational Safety and Hygiene, Chung Hwa University of Medical Technology
Postdoctoral Researcher, National Health Research Institutes
en.office: Environmental and Health Risk Assessment Laboratory (EP108)

zh.title: 新興環境污染物分析與生物檢測
zh.summary: 分析有機磷阻燃劑、持久性有機污染物與其他新興污染物，結合生物檢測方法評估毒性效應。

en.title: Emerging Pollutants and Biomonitoring
en.summary: Analysis of organophosphate flame retardants, persistent organic pollutants, and emerging contaminants using biological assays for toxicity evaluation.

zh.title: 環境與健康流行病學
zh.summary: 探討環境暴露、內分泌干擾物與兒童及嬰幼兒健康、神經發展等健康指標之關聯。

en.title: Environmental and Health Epidemiology
en.summary: Investigation of environmental exposure, endocrine-disrupting chemicals, child health, and neurodevelopmental indicators.

zh.title: 空氣污染物採集與分析
zh.summary: 進行 PM2.5、生物氣膠與空氣毒物採樣分析，並評估其衍生的細胞與生物毒性效應。

en.title: Air Pollutant Sampling and Analysis
en.summary: Sampling and analysis of PM2.5, bioaerosols, and air toxics, together with cellular and biological toxicity assessment.

zh.title: 氣候變遷與溫室氣體減量
zh.summary: 投入碳盤查、溫室氣體減量、廢棄物系統及資源循環等永續環境管理議題。

en.title: Climate Change and GHG Reduction
en.summary: Research and services in carbon inventories, greenhouse-gas mitigation, waste systems, and circular resource management.
